name: flowise-agent-flow-operator
description: Design, inspect, and regression-test Flowise agent flows.

interface.shortDescription: Design, inspect, and regression-test Flowise agent flows.
interface.longDescription: Help agents review Flowise flows for tool wiring, retrieval behavior, credential boundaries, deployment readiness, and plugin-level regression checks.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Flowise plugin to plan the workflow, identify verification checks, and produce plugin eval metadata.
